prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约8170→9671→10801→9855→10278，整体呈后移趋势，近5年累计后移约2100名；2025年基准位次约10278名，较2024年小幅后移约423名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021年37人、2022年41人、2023年44人、2024年46人、2025年51人，持续扩招；2026年计划56人，较2025年增加5人（+9.8%），扩招幅度明显，对位次有后移作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第56名持续提升至2026年第51名，近年排名稳中有升，学校综合实力获认可；2023年声誉评价偏负面（小语种专业位次下降6211），但2026年声誉文件中未出现该校，近期无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第21（较热），短视频曝光量较高，报考关注度有所升温；水产A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A-、食品科学与工程A-，海洋与水产学科全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合；辽宁省2026年考生总数约20万人（较2025年物理类14.3万大幅增加），竞争加剧；省控线物理类本科批2021–2025年分别为336→362→360→368→367，基本稳定；中国海洋大学位于山东青岛，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；辽宁考生对沿海985高校认可度较高，跨省报考热度不减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招约9.8%对位次的后移作用，以及辽宁省考生总数大幅增加、抖音热度较热、软科排名提升带来的竞争加剧前移作用，两者对冲后竞争略加剧；预测2026年物理类最低位次约10833名，区间10333–11333名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8170 → 9671 → 10801 → 9855 → 10278, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2100 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10278, a slight backward shift of about 423 positions compared to 2024; the enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province Physics Category was 37 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 51 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 56, an increase of 5 (+9.8%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, which has a backward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily improved from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, with a stable upward trend in recent years, and the university's comprehensive strength is recognized; in 2023, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 positions), but the 2026 reputation file does not mention this university, with no major negative public opinion recently; Douyin heat total ranking 21st (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, and the attention for applications has increased; Aquatic Products A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and aquatic disciplines leading nationally, which strongly attracts applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors; the total number of candidates in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 200,000 (a significant increase from 143,000 in Physics Category in 2025), intensifying competition; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch from 2021 to 2025 was 336 → 362 → 360 → 368 → 367, basically stable; Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, with no local enrollment preference; Liaoning candidates have a high recognition of coastal 985 universities, and cross-province application enthusiasm remains high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the backward effect of the 2026 expansion of about 9.8% on rankings, and the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Liaoning Province, the hot Douyin heat, and the forward effect of intensified competition due to the improvement in Soft Science rankings, the two effects offset each other with slightly intensified competition; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 10833, with a range of 10333–11333.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10333–11333, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10333), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Marine Science (Blue Dream Class) and Computer Category; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (around 11333), mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety, striving to enter the university.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2436 → 1729 → 2154 → 1438 → 1485, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2024, it notably advanced to 1438th place, then slightly retreated to 1485th in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1485th. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province was 13 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 10 in 2024–2025. In 2026, the plan is 11 students, an increase of 1 (+10%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion that may cause a minor backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily improved from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, showing a consistent upward trend. In 2023, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (minor language majors saw a ranking drop of 6211), but in 2026, the university does not appear in reputation documents, and there have been no major negative public opinions recently. Its Douyin popularity ranks 21st overall (relatively hot), indicating increased attention from applicants. It has A+ in Aquaculture and Marine Science, A- in Biology and Food Science and Engineering, making its marine and fisheries disciplines top in the country. However, its History Category majors are mainly Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, and English, which have low correlation with its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has mixed social popularity with a wait-and-see attitude, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, with an estimated 56,000 in History Category based on recent proportions, roughly the same as 2025. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch from 2021 to 2025 was 456 → 404 → 404 → 400 → 437, with a sharp increase of 33 points in 2025, reflecting intensified competition. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university. Liaoning examinees have a high recognition of coastal 985 universities, so cross-province application enthusiasm remains high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the slight backward shift effect of the 10% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the forward shift effect of intensified competition due to the sharp rise in the provincial control line and increased Douyin popularity, the two effects offset each other with slightly intensified competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 1544, with a range of 1312–1776.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Chinese Language and Literature
- Business Administration (Digital Innovation Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Network and New Media).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1312–1776, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1312), you can focus on sprinting for Law and Chinese Language and Literature. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1776), you should mainly rely on English as a safety net.
